input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
with open('articles/2026/03/20/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
        content = (a.get('content','') or '').lower()[:5000]
        for kw in ['hezbollah rocket northern israel', 'hezbollah attack kill', 'northern community rocket', 'hezbollah fire kill']:
            if kw in title or kw in content[:2000]:
                print(f'[{kw}] {a.get(\"title\",\"\")[:160]}')
                print(a.get('content','')[:500])
                print('---')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -20
